Japan Hormuz Supply Disruption Warning

Active
Middle East / Indo-Pacific energy

Japanese government-linked expert Tsuneo Watanabe: does not expect Strait of Hormuz to open soon; Hormuz supply disruptions could last over a year. Ceasefire between US and Iran "very fragile"

2026-04-10

Japan Shipbuilding Revival Plan

Active
Indo-Pacific energygovernancediplomacy

Japan announces US$6.3 billion (1 trillion yen) shipbuilding revival push; partly driven by Middle East turmoil and supply chain vulnerability. Analysts note money alone won't restore former standing vs. China due to labour shortages and lost capacity as structural barriers.

2026-04-10

Japan Ukraine Drone Manufacturer Tie-Up

Active
Indo-Pacific / Europe/NATO conflictdiplomacy

Japan firm's tie-up with Ukrainian drone maker sparks Russia concerns; Russia protested via Deputy Foreign Minister Rudenko to Japanese ambassador. Signals Japan may be moving toward supporting closer defense cooperation with Ukraine.
